posts.text: This is a remnant from Siculo-Arabic pronunciation. Capocollo = Gabagool, Capisci = Gabish C->ق, (the "g" is pronounced like a qaf) p ->b Sicilian, Napolitan, & Calabrese (Galabrez) drop final unstressed vowels, much like Spanish.
posts.author: nntaleb

posts.text: Crazy Eddie Memoirs: Zohran Mamdani says he closed a $12 billion deficit. Deferred pension payments don’t close a deficit. They move today’s bill onto tomorrow’s taxpayers and call it fiscal discipline. At Crazy Eddie, we called that cooking the books.
posts.author: BarbarianCap
